title: [MTR] E7/W7 Series Shinkansen
description: E7/W7 Series Shinkansen addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the **E7 and W7 Series Shinkansen** to the game :
- E7 Series cabs
- W7 Series cabs
- E7/W7 Series passenger cars

Both variants include standard class cabs, GranClass cabs, standard cars, green cars and pantograph cars.

Big thanks to **[Yakuro](https://modrinth.com/user/yakuro)** for the GranClass seats and bogies. Check out his content!

## Please enjoy it!

**[Check out my other Shinkansen packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

![E7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f1916468a940df78e0a584817a32684f43c4803.jpeg)
